title: White Paper Stems Cotton Buds (5.4cm x 9cm x 9cm) 200 Pack - 100% Biodegradable, Eco-Friendly, Perfect for Beauty, Household Cleaning & Arts and Crafts Projects
features: ECO-CONSCIOUS CHOICE: Comprising 200 cotton buds, each meticulously crafted with a paper stem, our white-stem cotton buds champion environmental care. They are 100% biodegradable, making them a perfect selection for eco-aware individuals.
SUSTAINABLE MATERIALS: Our commitment to sustainability is evident in the choice of materials, each cotton bud is made from cotton and paper, prioritizing your health and the planet's well-being.

SAFE & GENTLE: Perfect for personal hygiene and cosmetic use, these cotton buds are gentle on your skin and safe for all ages. Rely on them for your daily beauty routine or for delicate tasks requiring precision.

VERSATILE USE: Measuring 5.4cm x 9cm x 9cm, these cotton buds are designed for multifaceted utility. Whether for beauty applications, household cleaning tasks, or engaging in arts and crafts projects, they accommodate a broad spectrum of needs.

PERFECT FOR ON-THE GO: With its compact size and durable packaging, our cotton buds are perfect for taking with you on your travels or in your daily bag. Be prepared for any situation while also reducing waste from single-use plastic applicators.
description: Product Description Each cotton bud features a paper stem that is constructed from 100% biodegradable environmentally friendly materials. Safety Warning No warning applicable
